message:
Dragging a window into the shelf dock auto-minimizes it

When a full-size window is dropped on the reserved shelf area,
it is minimized (which triggers _onMinimizedChanged and creates
a stamp on the shelf). Works for both tracked drag drops and
snap-to-grid fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
